title: navarretia heterophylla
intro: Navarretia heterophylla, also known as the heterophylla lemongrass or Navarretia, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. It is a member of the Phrymaceae family and is often used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Navarretia heterophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Navarretia heterophylla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
